scenarios.name: Motor trip
scenarios.description: Primary feed pump trips, followed by low-flow and permissive-related events.
expectedInvestigationOutputs: Trend pack showing falling flow after trip
Timeline showing trip before downstream low-flow consequence

scenarios.name: Low flow trip
scenarios.description: Flow control loop falls below target, causing a trip chain and operator intervention.
expectedInvestigationOutputs: Correlation between low flow and loop output behavior
Before/after comparison around operator mode change

scenarios.name: High temperature alarm
scenarios.description: Reactor temperature exceeds target and phase progression is held.
expectedInvestigationOutputs: Phase hold timeline linked to temperature deviation

scenarios.name: Valve failed to open
scenarios.description: A commanded valve movement does not complete, leading to reduced process response.

scenarios.name: Chattering alarm
scenarios.description: Level switch transitions repeatedly in a short period.

scenarios.name: Repeating nuisance alarm
scenarios.description: Repeated events from the same source create alarm fatigue.

scenarios.name: Batch phase hold
scenarios.description: Heat-up phase enters hold state due to deviation and delays the batch.

scenarios.name: Operator mode change
scenarios.description: Operator switches a loop mode during abnormal operation.

scenarios.name: Interlock active
scenarios.description: Protective logic prevents continued operation due to an unsafe condition.

scenarios.name: Device communication failure
scenarios.description: A field device loses communications and drives an alarm condition.
